name: Terrifying Trap Hole Nightmare
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>狂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>落</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>お</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>とし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>穴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If your opponent has Special Summoned a monster(s) this turn: Target 1 monster your opponent controls with 2000 or more ATK; destroy it, then if you have a "Hole" Normal Trap in your GY, you can banish 1 monster from your opponent's GY. You can only activate 1 "Terrifying Trap Hole Nightmare" per turn.
eff: If your opponent has Special Summoned a monster(s) this turn: Target 1 monster your opponent controls with 2000 or more ATK; destroy it, then if you have a "Hole" Normal Trap in your GY, you can banish 1 monster from your opponent's GY. You can only activate 1 "Terrifying Trap Hole Nightmare" per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
